chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 48 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 07-07-2022 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None has appeared for the applicant / accused. Learned DPG has placed on record ‘case flow management data’ and stated that applicant / accused Ashique Ali Machhi has been acquitted by the trial Court. In the view of above, this bail application has become infructuous, and is accordingly dismissed as having become infructuous. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
